Class EBook

java.lang.Object
libraryApp.Book
libraryApp.EBook
All Implemented Interfaces:
IMedia
public class EBook extends Book implements IMedia
Represents an electronic book (E-Book) in the library system. Extends Book and implements IMedia for digital content properties. REFACTORING IMPROVEMENTS: ✓ Fixed field naming (was "Degitalmedia" → now "Media") ✓ Added comprehensive JavaDoc documentation ✓ Improved code organization and readability ✓ Added proper status handling for digital books ✓ Consistent formatting across all methods

  • Field Summary

  • Constructor Details

    • EBook

      public EBook(String id, String title, String author, String category, int year, int copies, String downloadLink, double fileSizeMB)
      Constructor for creating an E-Book.
      Parameters:
      id - Unique book identifier
      title - Book title
      author - Book author
      category - Book category
      year - Publication year
      copies - Number of digital copies available
      downloadLink - URL for downloading the e-book
      fileSizeMB - File size in megabytes
